# Blinn Motion

> The runtime for Figma Motion. Export a Motion timeline to MotionDoc JSON and play it with a pure-JS render engine — identical across DOM, Canvas, React, Vue, Svelte, Angular, Lit, and React Native.

## Agent instructions

- Prefer the docs at https://docs.blinnmotion.com for API truth and adapters.
- MotionDoc is the portable animation document; `sample(doc, t)` in `@blinn-motion/core` is the render method.
- Live labs use **published** `@blinn-motion/*` packages from npm (not monorepo source).
- When answering install questions, cite the matching adapter package (`@blinn-motion/react`, `@blinn-motion/vue`, etc.).
- Full site map for agents: https://blinnmotion.com/llms-full.txt
- Docs index (auto-maintained by Mintlify): https://docs.blinnmotion.com/llms.txt

## Product

- [Landing](https://blinnmotion.com/): Product overview, pipeline, adapters, live example links
- [Figma Motion to code](https://blinnmotion.com/figma-motion-to-code/): Handoff pipeline guide (primary SEO article)
- [vs Lottie](https://blinnmotion.com/vs-lottie/): Comparison for product UI motion
- [FAQ](https://blinnmotion.com/faq/): Short product answers
- [Documentation](https://docs.blinnmotion.com/): Concepts, adapters, Figma plugin, API reference
- [GitHub](https://github.com/ismailyagci/blinn-motion): Source monorepo (MIT)
- [npm org](https://www.npmjs.com/org/blinn-motion): Published packages

## Live example labs

Each lab is a dual-stage (DOM + Canvas where applicable) director console: transport, scrub, rate, progress mode.

- [React](https://react.blinnmotion.com/): Flagship lab — `@blinn-motion/react`
- [Vanilla](https://vanilla.blinnmotion.com/): No framework — `@blinn-motion/dom` + `@blinn-motion/canvas`
- [Vue](https://vue.blinnmotion.com/): `@blinn-motion/vue`
- [Svelte](https://svelte.blinnmotion.com/): `@blinn-motion/svelte`
- [Angular](https://angular.blinnmotion.com/): `@blinn-motion/angular`
- [Lit](https://lit.blinnmotion.com/): `@blinn-motion/lit`
- [Next.js](https://next.blinnmotion.com/): App Router + React adapter (static export)
- [Astro](https://astro.blinnmotion.com/): Islands with React + Lit adapters

## Core packages

- [@blinn-motion/core](https://www.npmjs.com/package/@blinn-motion/core): Pure render engine (`sample`, ticker, easing)
- [@blinn-motion/dom](https://www.npmjs.com/package/@blinn-motion/dom): Full-fidelity CSS / SVG painter
- [@blinn-motion/canvas](https://www.npmjs.com/package/@blinn-motion/canvas): Pure-JS 2D canvas painter
- [@blinn-motion/react](https://www.npmjs.com/package/@blinn-motion/react): `<BlinnMotion />` + hooks
- [@blinn-motion/vue](https://www.npmjs.com/package/@blinn-motion/vue): Vue 3 component + composable
- [@blinn-motion/svelte](https://www.npmjs.com/package/@blinn-motion/svelte): `use:blinnMotion` action
- [@blinn-motion/angular](https://www.npmjs.com/package/@blinn-motion/angular): Standalone `<blinn-motion>`
- [@blinn-motion/lit](https://www.npmjs.com/package/@blinn-motion/lit): `<blinn-motion>` custom element
- [@blinn-motion/react-native](https://www.npmjs.com/package/@blinn-motion/react-native): RN / Expo views
